file_summary: This script configures DSPy with OpenAI and defines a ChainOfThought module for question answering.
Demonstrates initialization of the main Click CLI group and registration of subcommands for the PDD tool.
This script demonstrates the agentic architecture workflow using a mocked GitHub issue for architecture generation.
This script demonstrates usage of the agentic_architecture_orchestrator by mocking dependencies to simulate architecture generation for a sample e-commerce PRD.
Demonstrates the agentic bug investigation workflow using a mocked GitHub issue.
Simulates the agentic bug orchestrator workflow with mocks for testing bug handling in a sample issue.
Demonstrates the agentic change workflow with a mocked GitHub issue for prompt modification.
Demonstrates the agentic change orchestrator by simulating a feature addition workflow with mocked dependencies.
Demonstrates usage of run_agentic_checkup for GitHub issue-based project health checks with mocked dependencies.
Demonstrates simulated execution of the agentic checkup orchestrator for a CRM app using mocked dependencies.
This script demonstrates example usages of agentic workflow functions from pdd.agentic_common for testing and illustration.
